title: lwd_endpoints build: second block missing comment
description: In commands.rs there are two identical Vec<String> construction blocks for lwd_endpoints (one inside send_fn_box around line 198, one inside spawn_block_watcher setup around line 395). The first block has a three-line comment explaining why a user-supplied override is used exclusively vs network defaults. The second block has no comment. A reader maintaining the watcher path does not get the same context. The comment should be duplicated (or the construction extracted into a helper).
